M1.title: Neutral core spine (model, classifier, plan records, config)

M3.title: Generic OTel backend adapter + real span verify

M4.title: Discovery -> committed config + resolution protocol + drift

M5.title: Harness adapters (Claude Code + Codex; skill-driven CLI, no MCP server)

M6.title: TypeScript pack + native backends (Braintrust/LangSmith) + CI mode

e2e_verified: Python x OTel x testclient: discover -> classify -> (red) verify -> fix -> (green) verify -> idempotent. 30 tests green; the gigaphone CLI onboard prints a 3/3 nested+complete report.
next_task: v2: tree-sitter-backed TS parsing + run the TS pack through a TS testclient e2e; richer interprocedural def-use; package the harness plugins to the marketplaces. (Logfire + Arize/Phoenix backends landed — OTel family, native init/detection, shim reuse.)
notes: Structured cross-session state (JSON so agents don't inappropriately edit it). The four fixes (trace_boundary/restore_context/map_output, plus advisory no_boundary) are real and tested. TS pack is parserless (lexical) in v1 per ADR-0007; not yet exercised by an e2e.
